A '''battle ''' took place between the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] as part of the [[Outer Rim Sieges/Legends|Outer Rim Sieges]], which were in turn a part of the [[Galaxy/Legends|galaxy]] spanning conflict called the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. Occurring on the icy [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] world of [[Toola/Legends|Toola]], a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] task force led by [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Masters]] [[Kai Hudorra]] and [[Simms]], engaged [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] forces in battle.

==The battle==
After weeks of stalemate, the Jedi led an assault team against the enemy's main generators using the herbivore animals [[Mastmot/Legends|mastmots]] as mounts, while the rest of their troops conducted a diversionary attack. The tactic was successful, but soon after their victory, [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]] was given, [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] of the Republic commanding the [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] troopers to kill their [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] commanders for [[Treason/Legends|treason]]. [[Clone Commander/Legends|Clone Commander]] [[Keller (clone commander)|Keller]] ordered his men to comply with the order. In the ensuing firefight, Master Hudorra and Simms' [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]], [[Noirah Na]], escaped on stolen [[Single Trooper Aerial Platform/Legends|STAPs]] while Master Simms covered them, at the cost of her life.

==Aftermath==
Fleeing towards [[Ithaqua Station]], Hudorra and Na abandoned their [[Single Trooper Aerial Platform/Legends|Single Trooper Aerial Platforms]] after one ran out of fuel. Keller and his troops found them and alerted the garrison at Ithaqua of the Jedi's approach. Despite martial law, a curfew in effect, and clone patrols covering the streets, Master Hudorra managed to sneak into the city to learn what had happened with the clones. After finding out about the war's end and the emergence of a [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], the two fugitive Jedi managed to reach [[Toola Spaceport]] and leave on a transport for [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].

==Appearances==
*[[Republic 79|''Republic'' 79]] {{1st}}
